title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 26: External Things
description: Chapter 26 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 26 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: External things cannot be counted on. Hence Long Feng was executed, Bi Gan was sentenced to die, Prince Ji Zi feigned madness, E Lai was killed, and Jie and Zhou were overthrown. There is no ruler who does not want his ministers to be loyal.
